message:
fix: resolve test failures and add extractor exports to umbrella crate

- Fix mixed_sync_and_async_shutdown_hooks test to expect correct
  async-first ordering [2, 3, 1]
- Fix response_with_binary_header_value test to expect sanitized
  value (null bytes removed for HTTP safety)
- Fix doctest imports in response.rs (use public re-exports)
- Add #[allow] attributes for clippy float_cmp on exact literals
- Add #[allow] for cast_precision_loss in test injection_rate
- Add #[allow] for struct_excessive_bools on ResponseModelConfig
- Add #[allow] for result_large_err on ResponseModel::validate
- Fix redundant closures in extract.rs and test files
- Add comprehensive extractor re-exports to fastapi umbrella crate
  (Json, Path, Query, Header, Cookie, State, Auth, Pagination)
- Add extractors module to umbrella crate
- Update prelude to include common extractors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
